new_features_proposed.name: constructor_dominance
new_features_proposed.description: Ratio of constructor points to field average

new_features_proposed.name: quali_trend
new_features_proposed.description: Slope of qualifying gap over last 5 races (negative = improving)
new_features_proposed.hypothesis: Drivers with improving qualifying trend should finish higher

new_features_proposed.name: home_advantage
new_features_proposed.description: Difference between overall form and circuit-specific form
new_features_proposed.hypothesis: Positive value = driver performs better at this circuit than average

new_features_proposed.name: grid_volatility
new_features_proposed.description: Std dev of grid position over last 5 races
new_features_proposed.hypothesis: More consistent qualifiers should finish higher

new_features_proposed.name: points_acceleration
new_features_proposed.description: Second derivative of cumulative points — acceleration of form
new_features_proposed.hypothesis: Drivers gaining momentum faster should be more competitive

model_recommendations: Model struggles most at Circuit Park Zandvoort (avg error: 4.3 positions). Consider adding circuit-specific features like elevation, corners count.
